characters.life_stage_evidence: Red smeared across pale skin, catching on old age spots.
skin_tone_signals: White hair and skin and blue eyes
characters.who_is_this: Canadian man driving alone in Sinaloa, kidnapped in highway ambush
characters.what_do_they_want: to avoid capture and retain some control over the situation
characters.where_are_they: highway in Sinaloa, then troop carrier truck heading toward Sierra Madre
characters.why_signal: survival and maintaining agency when escape is impossible
characters.how_signal: slow breathing, grounding, counting, controlled speech, claiming physical space
characters.arc_state_in_chunk: cautious driver sensing danger, then captive among other abductees
characters.arc_pressure: armed cartel crew blocking highway and forcing him into truck
characters.arc_shift: moves from potential escape to accepting capture and managing fear

his vehicle and symbol of mobility taken over by kidnappers
part of his low-profile appearance and minor protective gear

shares cramped space and brief exchange about brother being taken

evidence_anchors.excerpt: A blue glass evil eye, a miniature Banff plate with ALBERTA framing MIKE
White hair. Blue eyes. Tall. I stood out against all that dust and sun-faded cloth.

terminalLedger.finalBeliefState: frightened captive with wrists cut by zip-ties
terminalLedger.evidenceQuote: rubber boots gray with dried mud, long-sleeve work shirt stained dark at the collar
the office worker in the sweat-darkened blue dress shirt sat stiff-backed
Farther down, the older rancher held his hat between both hands
Diego beside him, eyes glued to the ground.
The driver from the highway stood there—belly soft over his belt...
